plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RunWars needs your location to track your runs and claim territory.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: RunWars needs background location to track runs while the app is minimized.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: RunWars needs your location to show you on the map.
